pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version from 1.8 to 11 to support the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support.
Add explicit dependency for javax.annotation-api which was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Add JAXB runtime dependency as it was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Upgrade Hibernate from 4.3.6.Final to 5.4.25.Final to match Spring Boot 2.x requirements.
Upgrade Liquibase from 3.3.2 to 4.2.2 to ensure compatibility with newer Spring Boot and Java versions.
Replace hazelcast-hibernate4 with hazelcast-hibernate53 to support Hibernate 5.
Replace jackson-datatype-hibernate4 with jackson-datatype-hibernate5 to support Hibernate 5.
Replace Joda-Time dependencies with Java 8+ JSR-310 (java.time) support via jackson-datatype-jsr310.
Replace springfox-swagger2 with springfox-oas to support OpenAPI 3.0 specification.
Replace commons-lang 2.6 with commons-lang3 to use the modern Apache Commons Lang library.
Update MapStruct from 1.0.0.CR1 to 1.4.1.Final and switch to the standard mapstruct artifact.
Replace spring-boot-actuator with spring-boot-starter-actuator to follow Spring Boot 2.x starter conventions.
Import jhipster-dependencies BOM to manage transitive dependency versions consistently.
Change project packaging from war to jar to align with modern Spring Boot executable jar standards.
Update various Maven plugins (compiler, surefire, failsafe, etc.) to versions compatible with Java 11 and Maven 3.3+.
Add Testcontainers MySQL dependency for modern integration testing capabilities.
Add ArchUnit dependency for architectural unit testing.
Update SonarQube plugin and properties to match current best practices and tooling versions.
Update Node.js and NPM versions to v14.15.0 and 6.14.10 for frontend build compatibility.
Add Jib Maven plugin for container image building without a Docker daemon.
Update Checkstyle and related plugins to newer versions for improved code quality checks.
Add javax.cache-api dependency to support standard caching annotations.
Add hibernate-jpamodelgen for type-safe criteria queries.
Add spring-boot-configuration-processor to generate metadata for externalized configuration.
Add springfox-bean-validators to support Bean Validation annotations in Swagger documentation.
Explicitly set H2 database dependency scope to test to avoid production inclusion.
Update validation-api to 2.0.1.Final to support Java 8+ features in Bean Validation.
Update Javassist version to 3.27.0-GA to match Hibernate 5.4 requirements.
Update liquibase-hibernate to version 4.2.2 to support Hibernate 5.
Add jackson-module-jaxb-annotations to support JAXB annotations in Jackson serialization.
Keep jackson-datatype-hppc but remove explicit version to let BOM manage it.
Keep hazelcast-spring but remove explicit version to let BOM manage it.
Keep hazelcast core but remove explicit version to let BOM manage it.
Keep HikariCP but remove explicit version and exclusions to let BOM manage it.
Keep MySQL connector but remove explicit version to let BOM manage it.
Keep hibernate-validator but remove explicit version to let BOM manage it.
Keep hibernate-core but remove explicit version to let BOM manage it.
Keep liquibase-core but remove exclusions to let BOM manage it.
Add mapstruct-processor with provided scope for annotation processing.
Keep spring-boot-loader-tools but remove explicit version to let BOM manage it.
Add spring-boot-starter-cache for caching support.
Add jhipster-framework dependency for JHipster-specific utilities.
Remove deprecated Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies which are no longer supported in modern Spring Boot versions.
Remove legacy metrics reporter dependency in favor of Micrometer.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for modern metrics collection.
Add Dropwizard metrics core dependency.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 API for architecture testing.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 Engine for architecture testing.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web for standardized error responses.
Add Spring Boot Test dependency explicitly.
Add Spring Security Test dependency explicitly.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine to enforce JUnit 5 usage.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added exclusion for org.junit.vintage:junit-vintage-engine in spring-boot-starter-test.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin with annotation processor paths for MapStruct, Hibernate, and JAXB.
Remove maven-processor-plugin as annotation processing is now handled by maven-compiler-plugin.
Update Liquibase plugin to use Hibernate 5 extension instead of Hibernate 4.
pom.xml.human_impl: Changed dependency from liquibase-hibernate4 to liquibase-hibernate5.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jib Maven plugin for container image building.
Add Checkstyle plugin for code style enforcement.
Add Javadoc plugin configuration.
Add Failsafe plugin for integration tests.
Add IDEA plugin configuration.
Add Resources plugin configuration for filtering YAML files.
Add Properties Maven plugin to read sonar-project.properties.
Add Git Commit ID plugin for build metadata.
Update JaCoCo plugin to support separate unit and integration test coverage reports.
pom.xml.human_impl: Configured pre/post unit and integration test executions for jacoco-maven-plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove SortPom plugin as it is no longer required.
Remove Gatling Maven plugin.
Remove Eclipse plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-eclipse-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Enforcer plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-enforcer-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Surefire plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-surefire-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove War plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-war-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove JaCoCo plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Sonar plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.codehaus.mojo:sonar-maven-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Liquibase plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.liquibase:liquibase-maven-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Boot Maven plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-maven-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set default Maven goal to spring-boot:run.
Remove explicit resource filtering configuration in favor of plugin management.
Remove Eclipse m2e lifecycle mapping configuration.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed <pluginManagement> block containing m2e lifecycle mapping.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-failsafe-plugin to manage integration tests.
Add sonar-maven-plugin for code quality analysis.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin with repackage goal and main class.
Add profile to disable Liquibase database migrations.
Add profile to enable API documentation generation.
Add profile to enable TLS/SSL configuration.
Add profile to manage frontend build with Webpack.
Add development profile with Undertow, DevTools, and H2 dependencies.
Switch production profile from Tomcat to Undertow.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to dev profile for Node/NPM installation and Webpack build.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to prod profile for Node/NPM installation and Webpack production build.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to generate build info.
Add profile to build WAR archives.
Add profile to support IDE-specific configurations like MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator.
Add profile to configure Eclipse m2e lifecycle mapping.
Add profile for end-to-end testing configuration.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganize .editorconfig to group file-specific overrides and remove obsolete bower.json configuration.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent settings to specific glob patterns and removed [{package,bower}.json] block.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with `* text=auto` and extensive lists for text, binary, documents, and config files.

.gitignore.general_idea: Refactor .gitignore to use modern directory-only patterns and add new tool-specific ignore rules for JHipster 6.x ecosystem.
.gitignore.human_impl: Changed patterns like '/node_modules/**' to 'node_modules/' and added sections for VS Code, STS, ESLint, and Maven Wrapper.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration target.
Remove the explicit javaVersion configuration as JHipster 7 defaults to Java 11 and no longer requires this field for standard setups.
Rename the application base name to reflect the specific sample application identity.
Update the Java package name to match the new application identity.
Change websocket configuration from string 'no' to boolean false to match newer JHipster schema.
Change searchEngine configuration from string 'no' to boolean false to match newer JHipster schema.
Remove the deprecated frontendBuilder configuration as Grunt is no longer supported in JHipster 7.
Remove the deprecated clusteredHttpSession configuration in favor of the cacheProvider setting.
Explicitly define the application type as monolith in the new configuration schema.
Specify test frameworks Gatling and Protractor in the new configuration schema.
Define the supported languages array in the new configuration schema.
Explicitly define the server port in the new configuration schema.
Add social sign-in configuration disabled in the new schema.
Enable Sass usage in the new configuration schema.
Define the JHipster prefix for CSS classes in the new schema.
Disable message broker in the new configuration schema.
Disable service discovery in the new configuration schema.
Specify npm as the client package manager in the new schema.
Specify AngularX as the client framework in the new schema.
Define Hazelcast as the cache provider in the new schema.
Enable Hibernate cache in the new configuration schema.
Disable reactive stack in the new configuration schema.
Initialize empty other modules array in the new schema.
Define empty entity suffix in the new schema.
Define DTO suffix in the new schema.
Set client theme to none in the new schema.
Initialize empty blueprints array in the new schema.
Disable embeddable launch script in the new schema.
Add creation timestamp to the configuration.
Disable skipping user management in the new schema.
Enable admin UI in the new schema.
Set empty client theme variant in the new schema.
Disable skipping client generation in the new schema.
Disable skipping server generation in the new schema.
Disable skipping identifier length check in the new schema.
Disable skipping fake data generation in the new schema.
Initialize empty pages array in the new schema.
Define native language in the new schema.
List existing entities in the new schema.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster development, build, and testing instructions.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt-based build system and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt and karma dependencies; added @angular/core, @angular/cli, and related Angular 11 packages.

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency from version 2.19.0 to 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Replace Karma/Jasmine testing setup with Jest and Protractor for end-to-end testing.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma and jasmine-core; added jest, @angular-builders/jest, and protractor.

package.json.general_idea: Rewrite npm scripts to use Angular CLI commands (ng build, ng serve) and Maven wrapper instead of Grunt tasks.
package.json.human_impl: Replaced "test": "grunt test" with comprehensive scripts using ng build, ng serve, and ./mvnw.

package.json.general_idea: Update package name, version, and description to reflect the specific application identity.
Explicitly declare the license status in the package metadata.
Add configuration fields for backend port, default environment, and packaging type to support CI/CD scripts.
Define cache directories for npm to improve build performance in CI environments.
Configure Jest output for SonarQube integration.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the H2 database alias to reflect the specific application name instead of a generic label.
src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.human_impl: Changed alias from 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' and updated the identifier to 'jhipsterHazelcastSampleApplication'.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Allow remote access to the H2 web console by enabling the 'allow others' flag.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's standard block-based banner using ${AnsiColor.GREEN} and ${AnsiColor.RED} variables.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Introduce the 'jhipster' namespace for framework-specific configuration like cache, CORS, and security.
Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP explicitly and standard URL format.
Move JPA and Hibernate properties into the standard 'spring.jpa' namespace.
Move Liquibase configuration into the 'spring.liquibase' namespace.
Move logging level configuration into the standard 'logging.level' namespace.
Add Spring Boot DevTools configuration for restart and livereload settings.
Add standard Spring Boot mail server configuration.
Add Thymeleaf cache configuration in the standard namespace.
Configure CORS settings under the JHipster specific properties.
Configure remember-me security key under JHipster properties.
Add Logstash forwarding configuration under JHipster logging properties.
Remove legacy metrics configuration (Spark/Graphite) replaced by Micrometer.
Remove legacy cache configuration moved to JHipster properties.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Introduce the jhipster namespace for application-specific configuration properties like cache, security, and mail settings.
Switch from legacy MySQL DataSource to HikariCP and update connection URL parameters for modern driver compatibility.
Update Hibernate dialect and remove deprecated naming strategy for compatibility with newer Hibernate versions in JDK 11.
Modernize logging configuration to use standard Spring Boot logging.level structure instead of custom metrics/logging blocks.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: INFO
    tech.jhipster: INFO

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace legacy metrics exporters (Spark, Graphite) with modern Spring Boot Actuator metrics configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add modern server features like graceful shutdown and compression, and restructure server properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl:
server:
  port: 8080
  shutdown: graceful
  compression:
    enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Move Hazelcast cache configuration into the jhipster namespace and update property names.
Add JHipster-specific mail base-url property and standardize Spring mail properties.
Add JHipster-specific security remember-me key configuration.
Move Liquibase context configuration under the spring namespace.
Simplify Thymeleaf configuration by removing mode specification and keeping cache enabled.
Explicitly disable devtools in production profile.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management namespace structure.
Replace custom async pool properties with standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution configuration.
Move mail configuration from root level to the standard spring.mail namespace.
Update Swagger documentation properties to align with newer SpringFox/JHipster conventions.
Add comprehensive Hibernate and JPA properties required for Spring Boot 2.x and JHipster 6.x compatibility.
Configure Hazelcast as the second-level cache provider for Hibernate.
Enable and configure Micrometer metrics export to Prometheus, replacing older metrics implementations.
Configure Kubernetes-style liveness and readiness probes in the health endpoint.
Add JHipster-specific application properties for client app name and API docs.
Configure server-side session cookie security settings.
